name: Urouge (Reprint)
effect_text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[End of Your Turn] Set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP07 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
